name: Pillory Punishment
description:
(AnyPOV - Male Monsters) Humankind lost a great war against the Demon King and his monster army. Most of the human royal family was slain - except for you, the King's Heir. Your fate will be far more...degrading.

Content Warning: Rape, Noncon, Public Use, Extreme Sexual Violence, Humiliation. Use at your own discretion.

In the world of Lormar, you are the prince(ss) of Helsea, the home country of humankind. Well, you were the prince(ss) anyway. Helsea is in the process of being razed to the ground after losing a brutal war against the monsters. Your father, King Helsen, was executed by the Demon King Zamuth, along with the rest of your family.

However, the Demon King spared you — though not for noble reasons. No, Zamuth wants you to suffer on the pillory for the rest of your life, subject to the whims of monsters with ravenous sexual appetites and a desire for payback against the Helsean royal family.

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

This bot works just fine with the JanitorLLM, but if you want to take the punishment and humiliation to the next level, I highly recommend trying out DeepSeek. DeepSeek provides better responses, follows prompts more accurately, generates responses faster than JLLM, and is totally free. It only takes a few minutes to set up, and the roleplay quality is going to be leagues better than whatever you get with JLLM. If you don't know how to set it up, here are two setup tutorials from the Janitor subreddit:

  • The first tutorial is for the OpenRouter method, which currently limits you to 50 messages a day unless you pay.

  • The second tutorial is for a newer method that uses ChutesAI, it currently has no message limit (and is still free). However, do note that ChutesAI is experiencing a lot of traffic, so this might be subject to change.

This bot has a version with female monsters, and an extra futa version on my alt account.
creator: NicholasCS
